name: White Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve sugar and yeast in 1/2 cup of the extra warm water. Set aside.
2. Combine salt, vital wheat gluten, and shortening with flour.
3. Add remaining 2 cups of extra warm water to flour mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Incorporate yeast mixture.
5. Knead dough until all flour is blended and it becomes elastic. If the dough is too sticky, add more flour. (You may knead for a while, let rest about 5 minutes, then return to work on it. This makes kneading easier without incorporating excess flour.)
6. Allow dough to rise for 1 1/2 hours, punching down as needed.
7. Divide dough into two portions. Shape into loaf size and place in greased loaf tins.
8. Let dough double in size in the tins. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
